description_long: This is a rectangular, art-deco style trash bin with a teal body and black trim, featuring gold decorative accents. The front panel displays the message 'KEEP BUENA VISTA STREET BEAUTIFUL' in gold, along with a circular opening at the top labeled 'BOTTLES & CANS' surrounded by geometric black designs. The sides and back are plain teal with black borders, lacking any openings or signage. The top is slightly curved, giving the bin a robust and elegant appearance. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, likely steel, with a painted finish for weather resistance. The bin is designed for public urban spaces, combining functionality with themed aesthetics.
description: A teal and black art-deco trash bin with gold signage and a circular opening for bottles and cans, designed for public urban use. The front features decorative accents and a clear message, while the sides and back are plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold 'KEEP BUENA VISTA STREET BEAUTIFUL' message, circular opening labeled 'BOTTLES & CANS', and art-deco accents.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain teal panel with black trim and no openings or signage.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, highlighting the decorative signage and opening.
description_view_3: Rear view identical to view 1, showing a featureless teal panel with black borders.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Gold lettering on the front with the message 'KEEP BUENA VISTA STREET BEAUTIFUL' and a 'BOTTLES & CANS' label above the opening.
